verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Since my soul is saved and sanctified, Feasting, I'm feasting, In this land of Canaan I'll abide, Feasting with my Lord.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Feasting, I am feasting, Feasting with my Lord; Feasting, I am feasting On the living Word.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Feeding on the honey and the wine, Feasting, I'm feasting, Gathering the clusters from the vine, Feasting with my Lord.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Day by day we have a new supply, Feasting, I'm feasting, And the food is never stale nor dry, Feasting with my Lord.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Many times we have an extra spread, Feasting, I'm feasting, Then to deeper truths I have been led, Feasting with my Lord.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Often there are only just us two, Feasting I'm feasting Then He tells me what He'd have me do, Feasting with my Lord.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: If perchance the cupboard's scarce of bread, Feasting, I'm feasting, On the hidden manna I am fed, Feasting with my Lord.
